caption: Two men are seated in front of a television, reacting to a video. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, and the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. Behind them is a shelf filled with media cases. Glowing orange text at the top of the screen reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". In the center of the image is a smaller screen displaying a scene from another video. In the first half of the sequence, the smaller screen shows a group of people in traditional clothing, with a subtitle that reads "Samarkand chose you." The men's expressions remain neutral and focused as they watch. As the sequence progresses, the scene on the smaller screen changes to a wide shot of several people in a courtyard area with blue arched architecture. The two men continue to watch the video with similar expressions.
